blocks.text: Linda Gallegos, copying Jason Torres and Matthew Parrish:

A short update and one request on the sales effectiveness work for {{fact:f:E-2016-001.client}}. The first set of bookings and pipeline data is in, and Matthew Parrish has it filed and reconciled against the summary figures your office sent. The rest of the information-request list is closed on our side; the two items still open are on yours, and I have both logged.

The one that matters this week is the deal-level win-loss detail for the last two years, rather than the summary counts. We can start from the summary, but the deal-level record is what lets us see where deals stall and what they close at, which is the heart of the assignment. If your team can send it this week, we stay on schedule. The other open item, the current territory assignments, can follow next week without holding anything up.

For the field interviews, Jason Torres would like to begin with the sales managers before the representatives. If you can point us to the three or four managers to see first, we will build the schedule around their calendars and route every request through your office. Nothing else is needed from Hughes Group today; I will send the interview schedule as soon as the first names are set.
